headline: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on Jack Henry & Associates, Lowers Price Target to $198
summary: DA Davidson  analyst Peter Heckmann   maintains Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $216 to $198.

raw.headline: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on Jack Henry & Associates, Lowers Price Target to $198
raw.summary: DA Davidson  analyst Peter Heckmann   maintains Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $216 to $198.

headline: JKHY Set to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Cards for the Stock?
summary: Jack Henry & Associates heads into Q3 earnings with sales seen rising but EPS declining, as cloud growth and payments strength are offset by higher costs.
